content.en:
"False Slash!"

The Perfection-level Spatial Saint Technique slashed towards the Black Pupil Saint Son.

The power of this move is very terrifying, if the Black Pupil Holy Son can't defend it, it will still be hit hard.

After all, in essence, even if the Black Pupil Holy Son was stronger than other Holy Endowers, he had no advantage in defense.

Unless, he can defend against holy skills.

Abrupt.

A set of ice armor appeared on the Black Pupil Holy Son.

This is the Holy Skill, the Nine Shadows Ice Armor, which is the famous Saint Technique of the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain, and the Black Pupil Saint Son is the heir of the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor, the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, and is one of the many heirs, but the talent is enough to rank in the top five.

Click!

The Nine Shadows Ice Armor was unable to block the Void Slash, and was directly smashed.

The remnants of the Void Slash could directly bombard the body of the Black Pupil Holy Son, but it was blocked by a set of holy relics.

Bang!!!!!

A set of black armor appeared on the Black Pupil Holy Son, and his own aura became very powerful.

"It's ......"

Ye Qingtian's expression changed, and he recognized the origin of this set of black battle armor.

He had seen a complete list of holy relics from the Battle Gate, and there were patterns of each holy relic on the list, and the holy relic on the Black Pupil Holy Son was the Black Heavenly Armor, which ranked 2999th on the list of divine relics.

The defense effect of the Black Sky Armor is very strong, but correspondingly, the cost of urging the Black Sky Armor is relatively large, and even the Black Pupil Holy Son cannot urge the Black Sky Armor for a long time.

"Damn, you actually forced me to urge the Black Sky Armor !!!"

The Black Pupil Son said angrily.

A life-saving thing like Hei Tianjia is difficult to urge with his current realm, just like Ye Tian wants to urge the Forbidden Yuan Blade, he also needs to pay a great price.

Of course, the price of the Black Sky Armor is not as great as the Forbidden Yuan Blade, but afterwards, the Black Pupil Holy Son will be weak for a long time, and he must use the extremely precious holy medicine to restore his body, otherwise he will leave sequelae.

Therefore, under normal circumstances, he would not use the Black Sky Armor.

But now there is no way, Ye Tian's attack is too powerful, and his Nine Shadows Ice Armor, a holy skill, can't be stopped.

He didn't want to get hurt, otherwise it would be easy to fall.

"Damn, since even the Black Sky Armor has been used, then he must be killed today!"

The Black Pupil Son hurriedly summoned the other Saints.

"You pull this person for me, and afterwards the treasure on his body will be divided into ninety percent for you, and I only need one percent!"

The Black Pupil Son said.

"Black Pupil Holy Son, do you have to use that thing?"

The other Saints were shocked.

As the Holy Endowment, and also a member of the Destruction Holy Clan, they naturally knew that the Black Pupil Holy Son had a very rare holy relic on his body, and this matter was a treasure given to the Black Pupil Holy Son by the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor.

It is said that this holy relic can kill the ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor, and the Returning Realm Saint Endowment is unstoppable, once locked, unless he has a very rare life-saving thing, he will definitely die.

"That's right, I'm just going to use that holy artifact, that one-time holy artifact, I didn't want to use it, but if I don't use it, are you sure to kill him?"

The Black Hitomi Son asked.

The other saints stopped talking, Ye Tian's strength, they saw it in their eyes.

They are not opponents, even if a few people work together, they can't beat Ye Tian, but they will be killed one by one.

Maybe more than ten Saint Endowments will go all out, and only then will they have any hope of killing Ye Tian, but they are afraid that they will also fall five or six Saint Endowments.

The price to pay is too great for anyone to do.

In fact, they all wanted to escape, and they were not ready to besiege Ye Tian.

But now that the Black Pupil Holy Son said to use that holy artifact, they just moved.

"Okay, I agree!"

"Black Pupil Holy Son, say okay, you must use that thing, otherwise we will flee immediately, and we will definitely not intercept this Holy Gifter from the Dark Sanctuary!"

"Black Pupil Holy Son, as long as you really use that holy artifact, we will definitely contain this holy endowment!"

......

Whoa!!!

A famous saint endowed man killed Ye Tian, leaving only one person to contain the light-clothed saintess.

That person may not be the opponent of the light-clothed saintess, but relying on the holy relics and life-saving things, he can hold out for a while.

In addition, two more saints have just arrived.

Eight Saint Grants besieged Ye Tian, and the Black Pupil Saint Son tried to urge the holy relic not far away.

It would take time to urge that holy artifact, otherwise the Black Pupil Holy Son would not have let these eight holy endowers besiege Ye Tian.

Bang!!!!

The Eight Great Saint Grants all used their holy skills to attack, covering this area, and there was no way to hide.

Ye Tian urged Jin Chenjia, and then used the holy technique-holy armor, which was a double-layer defense.

And the Holy Armor Holy Skill has a Royal Body Increase, which is comparable to the Perfection Grade Holy Skill.

Therefore, this round of attacks by the Eight Great Saints was all withstood by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian locked onto a seemingly slightly weaker Saint Endowment, and directly used the Holy Technique, the Suppression God, to launch a Soul Saint Skill blow at it.

Although the Holy Endowment had a soul secret treasure, it was not a soul holy relic, and when he was hit by the Divine Suppression Technique, his soul was suddenly shocked, and he couldn't even control the holy object on his body.

It was also at this time that Ye Tian used the Holy Technique Void Slash.

Poof!

The Holy Giver had been severed by a single blow, and he had been mortally dead, had it not been for the life-saving thing that had saved his life.

But he can't withstand the second blow, and if he does, he will definitely die!

"Take me away!"

The battered Blessed Giver yelled at a Blessed One with whom he had a good relationship.

Immediately, the Holy Gifted One grabbed him and fled quickly, not caring about the matter of the Black Pupil Holy Son.

However, they could not escape.

Ye Tian used the Holy Technique Aurora, and his speed skyrocketed many times in an instant, easily catching up with the severely injured Saint Endowment.

This time, Ye Tian didn't cast the Void Slash, and two consecutive Void Slashes would have a huge burden on the body, and he needed to wait for a while.

But he used the Golden Silk Holy Technique, which was not too burdensome on his body.

Burst!

A golden thread tore through the battered Saint-Blessed One, killing him in an instant.

The second Saint Endowment has fallen!

"Black Pupil Holy Son, are you okay, if you delay any longer, we won't be contained!"

One of the Saints shouted.

No one wants to die, and neither do they.

But now, the two Holy Endowments have fallen!

"That's it!"

The Black Hitomi Son responded.

At this time, a wooden bar appeared in front of the Black Pupil Holy Son.

This wooden stick was held in the hand of the Black Pupil Holy Son, and began to absorb the power of the blood of the Black Pupil Holy Son, and gradually became sharper, and it turned from a wooden stick into a wooden spear.

This wooden spear is full of destruction, as if it can kill everything!

It is not a holy relic on the list of holy relics, and its level is average among holy relics, but it can be called a supreme holy relic in the hands of the Unified Realm, and it can burst into terrifying attacks, but once its strength is exhausted, this holy relic will be scrapped.

It has a name, it's called the Bloodthirsty Wood Spear!
